fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item charge number that you are setting up.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item charge's product type to link transactions made for this item charge with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales tax group code that this item charge belongs to.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Search Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies text to search for when you do not know the number of the item charge.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.
